name: Lara Adult Cat Food -Fish 2kg
shortDescription: Let your beloved cat salivate with the crispy chunks of Lara Adult with Salmon. The ideal meal for a perfect condition and health.
description: The chunks based on salmon and chicken contain all the necessary minerals and vitamins that your active cat can use. Lara Adult with Salmon is a complete food for adult cats from 1 year old.
